cards.front: What is the purpose of inserting null values in the employee table?
cards.back: To represent missing or unknown data in the employee table

cards.front: What happens when you insert null values into a primary key column in an employee table?
cards.back: It creates a duplicate entry in the table

cards.front: What happens when you insert null values into a foreign key column in an employee table?
cards.back: It may cause data inconsistencies and errors in the table

cards.front: Which SQL command is used to insert null values into an employee table?
What is the result of inserting null values into a column with a NOT NULL constraint in an employee table?
cards.back: An error occurs and the insertion is rejected
